posts.author: Ania (Ania Bokina APJ Marketing at monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
image1568×920 191 KB

Join us for a 30-minute webinar to hear about the new monday WorkCanvas and see it demonstrated in action.
monday WorkCanvas is the online whiteboard for professionals: bring your teams together to ideate, create and innovate on a digital whiteboard made for work. With WorkCanvas you have:

  • Easy sharing
  • Templates
  • Infinite canvas
  • Offline capability
    Register HERE
